title: 52pc Deluxe Utility Exacto Knife Blade Complete Modeling Set Craft Hobby
description:
Hobby knives are great, but the biggest pain in the butt is not having that perfect blade for whatever it is you need it for. Well, never again- with this robust 52 piece set, you'll never need to go searching for more blades. These knives are sharp, and are great for pruning models, slicing paper, or anything else you may need them for. Includes: 7 Knife handles 37 Unique blades 5 Prove blades 1 Sharpening stone 1 Glue 1 Carrying case.
